---
title: "Final Report - Analysis"
author: "Laura Lu, Iris Shih, Brandon Moore"
date: 2026-03-19
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 2
    embed-resources: true
error: true
editor: visual
---

Packages/Sources Used

{r}
#Loading necessary packages
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)

#Sourcing .R files
source("load_clean_data.R")


{r}
youtube_raw <- load_youtube_data()
youtube <- clean_youtube_data(youtube_raw)

youtube
summary(youtube$engagement_rate)

The echo: false option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
